parameters: Do you want to board the train?
Board the train to the Omega Tower where the
dungeon awaits you. Before departing make sure
to visit Ghent and stock up.
Interact with the lockers to store or retrieve items.
This bar is a meeting place for adventurers
stopping at Ghent before heading to the Omega
Tower, you can buy there all the basic items
and some weapons you will need for your adventure.
There are many shops around this station and
